title: About these notes
html:
Hey, I'm Huy, principal engineer at Prime Data currently. Earlier, I worked at Treasure Data, and Atlassian before that.

These notes are my gathered bits of thoughts and things. Sometimes it's just a summerization of what I've read. Sometimes they are ideas that I digested from multiple sources and found a common pattern.

This site intentionally turned off all site-navigation and search features. I believe discovering through the connections would actually entertain you better. § On top of mind along with the above links can be looked at first as the panning out points.

I like to sketch occasionally. Recent I'm fascinating with Voxel art.

More about me.

  • Think-Do-Review

This site is inspired by (more precisely, blatantly stolen structures and styles from) Andy's notes system.

It is published with Obsidian Publish.

Reach me through huy.lenq@gmail.com or @huylenq
